title: Verify reminder notification delivery
description: Test that the WhatsApp/Push notification is successfully delivered to the user 24 hours before the trial is scheduled to end.
preconditions: User has enabled the 'Remind me' toggle.
User has provided necessary permissions for notifications.
Test environment allows for time manipulation or scheduled job triggering.

steps.description: 1. Set a reminder for a trial user.
2. Advance the system time to 25 hours before the trial's expiration.
3. Wait for the time to pass the 24-hour mark.
4. Check the user's device for the expected WhatsApp or Push notification.

expected_result: A notification with the correct, non-threatening copy is received on the user's device exactly 24 hours before the trial ends.
